 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ixb","title":"Set up toast notification system","description":"**Details:**
- Toast provider wrapping app
- useToast hook for triggering notifications
- Toasts for: copy success, install command copied, export complete, errors
- Auto-dismiss with configurable duration
- Position: bottom-right (desktop), bottom-center (mobile)

**Implementation based on brennerbot pattern:**
```typescript
// apps/web/src/components/ui/toast.tsx
// Copy from brennerbot, simplified

// apps/web/src/hooks/use-toast.ts
export function useToast() {
  const [toasts, setToasts] = useState<Toast[]>([]);
  
  const toast = (message: string, type: 'success' | 'error' = 'success') => {
    const id = crypto.randomUUID();
    setToasts(prev => [...prev, { id, message, type }]);
    setTimeout(() => {
      setToasts(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id \!== id));
    }, 3000);
  };
  
  return { toast, toasts };
}
```

**Toast Variants:**
- Success: Green with checkmark (copy, install)
- Error: Red with X (failures)
- Info: Blue with info icon (neutral messages)

**Animations:**
- Slide in from bottom
- Fade out on dismiss
- Stack vertically for multiple

**Location:**
- apps/web/src/components/ui/toast.tsx
- apps/web/src/hooks/use-toast.ts
- apps/web/src/components/toast-provider.tsx

**Reasoning:** Toast feedback is essential for copy/install actions. Users need confirmation that their action succeeded, especially for clipboard operations.","notes":"Mounted toast Toaster in Providers for global notifications","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:01.570554106-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:15:49.243089207-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:15:49.243089207-05:00","close_reason":"Already implemented: ToastProvider + useToast in copy/install flows","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ixb","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-vsk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:03.136666031-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

-{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-jaly","title":"Implement GA4 analytics event tracking","description":"## Origin
Mirror from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-81e. Keep both repos in sync.

## Task
Implement GA4 analytics event tracking for key user actions.

## Why This Matters
From PLAN: "GA4 only on Pro app. Track: onboarding success, conversion funnel, feature usage, retention signals."

## Events to Track

### Authentication Events
- `sign_in` - User signs in (method: google)
- `sign_out` - User signs out
- `sign_up` - New user registration

### Conversion Funnel
- `view_pricing` - User views pricing page
- `begin_checkout` - User starts checkout
- `purchase` - Successful subscription
- `subscription_cancel` - User cancels

### Feature Usage
- `prompt_create` - User creates prompt
- `prompt_view` - User views prompt detail
- `prompt_copy` - User copies prompt
- `prompt_save` - User saves to library
- `prompt_publish` - User publishes to Swap Meet
- `pack_create` - User creates pack
- `skill_create` - User creates skill
- `collection_create` - User creates collection
- `search` - User performs search (query)
- `filter_apply` - User applies filter

### Engagement
- `page_view` - Standard page view
- `scroll_depth` - 25%, 50%, 75%, 100%
- `time_on_page` - Session duration
- `feature_gate_hit` - User hits paywall

### Swap Meet
- `swapmeet_browse` - User browses community
- `swapmeet_search` - User searches community
- `swapmeet_prompt_view` - Views community prompt
- `swapmeet_prompt_save` - Saves community prompt
- `swapmeet_prompt_rate` - Rates community prompt

## Implementation

### GA4 Setup
```typescript
// src/lib/analytics/gtag.ts
export const GA_MEASUREMENT_ID = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID;

export function pageview(url: string) {
  window.gtag('config', GA_MEASUREMENT_ID, {
    page_path: url,
  });
}

export function event(action: string, params?: Record<string, any>) {
  window.gtag('event', action, params);
}
```

### Script Loading
```typescript
// In layout.tsx
<Script
  strategy="afterInteractive"
  src={`https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=${GA_MEASUREMENT_ID}`}
/>
<Script
  id="gtag-init"
  strategy="afterInteractive"
  dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{
    __html: `
      window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
      function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
      gtag('js', new Date());
      gtag('config', '${GA_MEASUREMENT_ID}', {
        page_path: window.location.pathname,
      });
    `,
  }}
/>
```

### React Hook
```typescript
// src/hooks/use-analytics.ts
export function useAnalytics() {
  const trackEvent = useCallback((action: string, params?: Record<string, any>) => {
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.gtag) {
      event(action, {
        ...params,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      });
    }
  }, []);

  return { trackEvent };
}
```

### Usage Example
```typescript
const { trackEvent } = useAnalytics();

const handleCopy = async () => {
  await copyToClipboard(prompt.content);
  trackEvent('prompt_copy', {
    prompt_id: prompt.id,
    category: prompt.category,
    source: 'detail_page',
  });
};
```

## Privacy Considerations
- Respect DNT (Do Not Track) header
- Include in privacy policy
- Allow opt-out in settings
- Don't track PII in events

## Files to Create
- `src/lib/analytics/gtag.ts`
- `src/lib/analytics/events.ts` (type-safe event definitions)
- `src/hooks/use-analytics.ts`
- `src/components/providers/analytics-provider.tsx`

## Success Criteria
- All key events are tracked
- Events include relevant metadata
- Page views track correctly
- Conversion funnel is measurable
- Privacy requirements met

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-jpv6","title":"Implement help center and FAQ system","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-9hn5.

## Task
Build a comprehensive help center with FAQ and documentation for user self-service.

## Why This Matters
- Reduces support tickets by 60-80%
- Users can find answers 24/7
- Improves user satisfaction
- Required for any SaaS product

## Components

### 1. Help Center Pages
- /help - Main help center
- /help/getting-started - Onboarding guide
- /help/billing - Billing FAQ
- /help/prompts - Prompt management
- /help/collections - Collections help
- /help/cli - CLI documentation
- /help/api - API reference (if applicable)

### 2. FAQ Categories
**Getting Started**
- How do I create an account?
- How does the free trial work?
- What's included in Premium?

**Billing & Subscription**
- How do I upgrade to Premium?
- How do I cancel my subscription?
- Where can I find my invoices?
- What payment methods do you accept?

**Prompts & Content**
- How do I create a prompt?
- How do I organize prompts into collections?
- How do I share a prompt?
- What are Skills?

**Account & Settings**
- How do I change my email?
- How do I delete my account?
- How do I export my data?

### 3. Search
- Full-text search across help articles
- Popular articles shown
- Related articles suggested

### 4. Contact Support Link
- "Still need help?" CTA
- Links to contact form

## Implementation
- Markdown-based articles (MDX)
- Static generation for SEO
- Search with Algolia or built-in

## Files to Create
- src/app/(public)/help/page.tsx
- src/app/(public)/help/[category]/page.tsx
- src/app/(public)/help/[category]/[slug]/page.tsx
- content/help/*.mdx
- src/components/help/help-search.tsx
- src/components/help/article-list.tsx

## Success Criteria
- All common questions covered
- Search works well
- SEO-friendly URLs
- Easy to update/maintain

## Test Coverage
- E2E: jeffreysprompts_premium-xwg2 (help center + search)

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xgh","title":"Create static registry routes (/registry.json, /registry.manifest.json)","description":"**Details:**
- Static JSON files generated at build time
- /registry.json - full prompt registry with all metadata
- /registry.manifest.json - checksums for cache validation

**/registry.json Format:**
```json
{
  "schemaVersion": 1,
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "updatedAt": "2026-01-10T00:00:00Z",
  "prompts": [...],
  "bundles": [...],
  "workflows": [...],
  "meta": {
    "totalPromptCount": 50,
    "categories": ["ideation", ...],
    "tags": ["ultrathink", ...]
  }
}
```

**/registry.manifest.json Format:**
```json
{
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "generatedAt": "2026-01-10T00:00:00Z",
  "checksums": {
    "registry": "sha256:abc123...",
    "prompts": {
      "idea-wizard": "sha256:def456...",
      ...
    }
  }
}
```

**Build Script Integration:**
- scripts/build-data.ts generates both files
- Files placed in apps/web/public/
- ETag headers based on manifest checksums
- CLI uses manifest for cache validation

**Location:** 
- apps/web/public/registry.json (generated)
- apps/web/public/registry.manifest.json (generated)

**Reasoning:** Static registry files enable CLI caching, offline PWA access, and efficient client-side search without API calls.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:33.677563084-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:39:27.800646247-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:39:27.800646247-05:00","close_reason":"Registry files already generated: registry.json and registry.manifest.json exist with proper schema version, checksums, and prompts data.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xgh","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-n3p","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:57.215409515-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xjfe","title":"Implement trending and discovery algorithm","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-8f3t.

## Task
Create algorithm for surfacing trending and recommended content.

## Why This Matters
- Help users discover great content
- Reward quality contributors
- Drive engagement
- Fresh content on homepage

## Trending Signals

### Engagement Metrics
- Views (weighted by recency)
- Saves/bookmarks
- Uses (copied/exported)
- Shares
- Ratings (weighted average)

### Quality Signals
- Creator reputation
- Content completeness
- Has description
- Has examples
- Tagged appropriately

### Freshness
- Recent content boosted
- Decay over time
- Evergreen content exceptions

## Algorithm

### Trending Score
```typescript
function calculateTrendingScore(prompt: Prompt, window: Duration): number {
  const viewScore = weightedViews(prompt.views, window) * 1.0;
  const saveScore = prompt.saveCount * 3.0;
  const useScore = prompt.useCount * 2.0;
  const shareScore = prompt.shareCount * 2.5;
  const ratingScore = (prompt.avgRating - 3) * prompt.ratingCount * 0.5;
  
  const engagementScore = viewScore + saveScore + useScore + shareScore + ratingScore;
  
  // Quality multiplier (0.5 - 1.5)
  const qualityMultiplier = calculateQualityScore(prompt);
  
  // Freshness decay
  const freshnessDecay = Math.pow(0.95, daysSinceCreated(prompt));
  
  return engagementScore * qualityMultiplier * freshnessDecay;
}
```

### Personalized Recommendations
- Based on user's saved content
- Based on viewing history
- Similar to liked items
- From followed creators
- Collaborative filtering (users like you)

## Implementation

### Batch Calculation
- Run hourly for trending
- Cache results
- Incremental updates

### Database
```typescript
export const trendingPrompts = pgTable('trending_prompts', {
  promptId: uuid('prompt_id').references(() => userPrompts.id).primaryKey(),
  score: numeric('score').notNull(),
  rank: integer('rank'),
  period: text('period'), // daily, weekly, monthly
  calculatedAt: timestamp('calculated_at').defaultNow(),
});
```

## Discovery Pages
- /explore - Browse trending
- /explore/new - Recent high-quality
- /explore/top - All-time best
- /for-you - Personalized

## Files to Create
- src/lib/discovery/trending.ts
- src/lib/discovery/recommendations.ts
- src/app/api/cron/calculate-trending/route.ts
- src/app/(app)/explore/page.tsx

## Success Criteria
- Trending reflects actual engagement
- Fresh content surfaces
- Quality content rewarded
- Personalization improves discovery

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xzgq","title":"Implement CLI offline mode and auto-update","description":"## Task
Add offline caching and auto-update mechanism to the jfp CLI.

## Why This Matters
- CLI users work offline sometimes
- Need access to synced prompts
- Auto-update keeps CLI current
- Better developer experience

## Scope
This is CLI client-side behavior and belongs in the public repo.
Depends on Premium API sync endpoints from `jeffreysprompts_premium-67o`.

## Features

### 1. Local Cache
- Cache synced prompts locally
- Cache authentication tokens
- Cache user preferences
- SQLite or JSON file storage

### 2. Offline Mode
- Detect network unavailable
- Serve from local cache
- Queue sync operations
- Show offline indicator

### 3. Auto-Update
- Check for updates on launch
- Download in background
- Prompt to restart
- Self-update mechanism

### 4. Configuration
- Cache directory location
- Cache size limits
- Update channel (stable/beta)
- Offline mode toggle

## Implementation

### Local Cache (CLI)
```ts
// ~/.jeffreysprompts/cache/
interface LocalCache {
  prompts: Map<string, CachedPrompt>;
  collections: Map<string, CachedCollection>;
  lastSync: Date;
  version: string;
}

class CacheManager {
  private cacheDir: string;

  async cachePrompt(prompt: Prompt): Promise<void> {
    const path = join(this.cacheDir, 'prompts', `${prompt.id}.json`);
    await writeFile(path, JSON.stringify(prompt));
  }

  async getPrompt(id: string): Promise<Prompt | null> {
    const path = join(this.cacheDir, 'prompts', `${id}.json`);
    if (!existsSync(path)) return null;
    return JSON.parse(await readFile(path, 'utf-8'));
  }

  async sync(): Promise<SyncResult> {
    const lastSync = await this.getLastSync();
    const changes = await api.getChangesSince(lastSync);
    // Apply changes to cache
    return { added: changes.added.length, updated: changes.updated.length };
  }
}
```

### Offline Detection
```ts
async function withOfflineSupport<T>(
  onlineAction: () => Promise<T>,
  offlineAction: () => Promise<T>
): Promise<T> {
  try {
    return await onlineAction();
  } catch (error) {
    if (isNetworkError(error)) {
      console.log(chalk.yellow('Offline mode: using cached data'));
      return offlineAction();
    }
    throw error;
  }
}
```

### Auto-Update
```ts
async function checkForUpdates(): Promise<UpdateInfo | null> {
  const currentVersion = getPackageVersion();
  const latestVersion = await fetchLatestVersion();

  if (semver.gt(latestVersion, currentVersion)) {
    return {
      current: currentVersion,
      latest: latestVersion,
      releaseNotes: await fetchReleaseNotes(latestVersion),
      downloadUrl: getDownloadUrl(latestVersion),
    };
  }
  return null;
}

async function performUpdate(info: UpdateInfo): Promise<void> {
  const spinner = ora('Downloading update...').start();

  // Download new version
  const binary = await downloadBinary(info.downloadUrl);

  // Replace current binary
  await replaceBinary(binary);

  spinner.succeed(`Updated to v${info.latest}`);
  console.log('Please restart the CLI to use the new version.');
}
```

### Config File
```yaml
# ~/.jeffreysprompts/config.yaml
cache:
  enabled: true
  maxSize: 100MB
  location: ~/.jeffreysprompts/cache

updates:
  channel: stable  # stable, beta
  autoCheck: true
  autoInstall: false

offline:
  enabled: true
  queueSync: true
```

## Files to Create (in CLI repo)
- src/cache/cache-manager.ts
- src/cache/offline-mode.ts
- src/updates/update-checker.ts
- src/updates/self-update.ts
- Use config module from jeffreysprompts.com-ctt5 (do not reimplement config manager)

## API Additions (Premium repo)
- GET /api/cli/sync?since=timestamp
- GET /api/cli/version (latest version info)

## Logging Requirements
- Log offline/online detection decisions and retry/backoff
- Log cache directory used and cache size accounting
- Log update checks (current vs latest) and update path chosen
- Log sync queue size and flush attempts when back online

## Success Criteria
- Prompts accessible offline
- Changes queued and synced
- Auto-update notifies users
- Config customizable

## Origin
Moved from `jeffreysprompts_premium-e2oq`.

## Cross-Repo Integration
- Premium CLI sync endpoints for offline cache refresh: jeffreysprompts_premium-67o","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:23:28.007456522-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T09:45:26.456228052-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-11T09:45:26.456228052-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented offline mode with network detection, cached data fallback for search/list commands, and auto-update check on CLI launch","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xzgq","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-uw7z","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:23:28.013113905-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xzgq","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-hiff","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:23:28.0158326-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xzgq","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ctt5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:25:14.958174135-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
